sections.heading: Purpose and Scope
sections.text: This policy establishes the minimum standards of professional conduct expected of all employees, contractors, and temporary staff engaged by the organization.
sections.human_instructions: All new employees must acknowledge this policy during onboarding within 5 business days.

sections.heading: Professional Standards
sections.text: All personnel must conduct themselves with integrity, honesty, and professionalism in all business dealings. Conflicts of interest must be disclosed immediately to the compliance officer.
sections.human_instructions: Annual declaration of interests required by December 31 each year.

sections.heading: Anti-Harassment
sections.text: The organization maintains zero tolerance for harassment, discrimination, or bullying of any kind. All reports will be investigated promptly and confidentially.
sections.human_instructions: Report incidents through the confidential hotline or directly to HR.
